# FF_TRUNCATED | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FF_TRUNCATED ](/documentation/forcefeedback/ff_truncated)

-  FF_TRUNCATED 

Global Variable# FF_TRUNCATED

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FF_TRUNCATED: HRESULT { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ff_truncated#Discussion)

The parameters of the effect were successfully updated by FFEffectSetParameters, but some of them were beyond the capabilities of the device and were truncated.
